cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Anthony could have gone to the bookstore. The question gives us several time intervals when Anthony was doing other activities. We need to find the time window when he wasn't doing any of those things, and the bookstore was still open. Let me list out what I know: 1. Anthony woke up at 7am. This just tells me when he started his day, but not necessarily when he was doing specific activities. 2. David saw Anthony working at the office
